passes.title: Boston Childrens Museum
passes.benefit_text:
The Boston Harbor Islands Discounted Passes offer 50% off up to 4 ferry tickets to visit Spectacle or Georges Islands. 
The code can be used throughout the entire 2025 season, which is listed below:
Georges Island
May 15 - June 14: Thursdays through Sundays
June 16 - September 1: every day
Spectacle Island
source_phrases: The Boston Harbor Islands Discounted Passes offer 50% off up to 4 ferry tickets to visit Spectacle or Georges Islands.
The code can be used throughout the entire 2025 season, which is listed below:
Georges Island
May 15 - June 14: Thursdays through Sundays
June 16 - September 1: every day
Spectacle Island
July 15 - September 1: every day
September 4 - 21: Thursdays through Sundays
September 26 - October 13: Fridays through Sundays
Peddocks Island from Hingham
June 15 - September 7: every day BUT Tuesdays
September 10 - October 12: Thursdays through Sundays

passes.title: Harvard Museums Of Science And Culture
source_phrases: Each unique discount code provides up to four (4) people with $5 admission per person—children under the age of 18 are always admitted free.
Patron's must utilize the discount code online to make a reservation for the museum.
This library pass does not guarantee a reservation to the Museum. If you have any issues reserving your tickets, you can call the Gardner Museum's Box Office at 617 278 5156.

passes.title: Isabella Stewart Gardner Museum
passes.benefit_text:
Patrons may check out up to one pass for the Massachusetts Department of Conservation and Recreation per month.
This is a physical pass that must be picked up from the library at which you made the reservation.
The pass must be returned to the library you borrowed it from within 3 days of it's use.
source_phrases: Patrons may check out up to one pass for the Massachusetts Department of Conservation and Recreation per month.
This is a physical pass that must be picked up from the library at which you made the reservation.
The pass must be returned to the library you borrowed it from within 3 days of it's use.

passes.title: Massachusetts State Parks Department Of Conservation And Recreation
passes.benefit_text:
Children 6 and under are admitted free. Each pass allows admission for 2 adults at $10 each (general admission and special exhibition) and up to 4 children ages 7–17 at $10 each (special exhibition only). There is no discount for children 7–17 for general admission, currently $10.
Please note the MFA is increasing prices for Institutional Pass discounted admission tickets for visit dates beginning January 20, 2026. Going forward, each pass will allow admission for 2 adults at $15 each and up to 4 children ages 7–17 at $10 each.
source_phrases: Children 6 and under are admitted free. Each pass allows admission for 2 adults at $10 each (general admission and special exhibition) and up to 4 children ages 7–17 at $10 each (special exhibition only). There is no discount for children 7–17 for general admission, currently $10.

Please note the MFA is increasing prices for Institutional Pass discounted admission tickets for visit dates beginning January 20, 2026. Going forward, each pass will allow admission for 2 adults at $15 each and up to 4 children ages 7–17 at $10 each.

passes.title: Museum Of Fine Arts
passes.benefit_text:
This pass will admit up to 4 people at a 50% discount on tickets to the Museum’s Exhibit Halls. Children under 3 are not included in the count of 4 and are always admitted for free.
Your Library pass can only be used on the date printed on the pass.
Please bring your library pass confirmation (printed or displayed on a phone) when you visit.
When you arrive at the Museum, stop at the Box Office to exchange your library pass and purchase your Exhibit Halls tickets at the discounted rate. If you have any questions or if you would like to reserve your Exhibit Halls passes in advance to avoid waiting in line the day of your visit, please call 617-723-2500 (9:00 a.m. – 5:00 p.m. daily).
If you are unable to show your Library confirmation on a phone, you may print out a copy using the link in the confirmation email or request a paper copy from the library.
source_phrases: This pass will admit up to 4 people at a 50% discount on tickets to the Museum’s Exhibit Halls. Children under 3 are not included in the count of 4 and are always admitted for free.
Your Library pass can only be used on the date printed on the pass.
Please bring your library pass confirmation (printed or displayed on a phone) when you visit.

When you arrive at the Museum, stop at the Box Office to exchange your library pass and purchase your Exhibit Halls tickets at the discounted rate. If you have any questions or if you would like to reserve your Exhibit Halls passes in advance to avoid waiting in line the day of your visit, please call 617-723-2500 (9:00 a.m. – 5:00 p.m. daily).
If you are unable to show your Library confirmation on a phone, you may print out a copy using the link in the confirmation email or request a paper copy from the library.

passes.title: Museum Of Science
passes.benefit_text:
This coupon allows 50% off admission to the New England Aquarium.
Only applies to adult and child pricing.
This is not a ticket.
Redeem this coupon in the General Admission line at the Aquarium’s ticket booth for discounted admission for up to 4 people.
Please visit neaq.org/coupons for details.
Review the Aquarium’s website at www.neaq.org/safety ahead of your visit to ensure a safe and accessible experience.
source_phrases: This coupon allows 50% off admission to the New England Aquarium.
Only applies to adult and child pricing.
This is not a ticket.
Redeem this coupon in the General Admission line at the Aquarium’s ticket booth for discounted admission for up to 4 people.
Please visit neaq.org/coupons for details.
Review the Aquarium’s website at www.neaq.org/safety ahead of your visit to ensure a safe and accessible experience.
Valid only for Aquarium admission.
This coupon does not provide any other discounts and cannot be applied to combo tickets.
Library coupons or tickets obtained with library coupons may not be sold.
Void if altered or copied. No cash value.
Hours of operation are subject to change.

passes.title: New England Aquarium
passes.benefit_text:
The PEM Library Pass allows admission for up to two (2) adult visitors with the reduced admission rate of $12 per person. Children age 16 and under are always admitted free.
Patrons must use their unique discount code to reserve tickets at the discounted rate. The Library Pass does not guarantee admission to the Peabody Essex Museum.
Admission to special ticketed exhibitions may require a separate fee.
source_phrases: The PEM Library Pass allows admission for up to two (2) adult visitors with the reduced admission rate of $12 per person. Children age 16 and under are always admitted free.
Patrons must use their unique discount code to reserve tickets at the discounted rate. The Library Pass does not guarantee admission to the Peabody Essex Museum.
Admission to special ticketed exhibitions may require a separate fee.

passes.title: Peabody Essex Museum
passes.benefit_text:
GO Passes allow for one-time use as admission for two adults and children under 18 to any of the 100+ Trustees properties. GO Pass admission is equivalent to a Trustees Family Membership admission price at Trustees properties that charge an admission fee.
GO Passes are valid for admission only; not valid for discounts at parking kiosks, stores, cafes, Inns, Campgrounds, at special events or programs, on equipment rentals, or in place of any permits or passes.
To use GO Passes with a Trustees site that requires timed entry, you will need to enter the promo code listed on the physical pass. Passes are available at www.thetrustees.org/passes
source_phrases: GO Passes allow for one-time use as admission for two adults and children under 18 to any of the 100+ Trustees properties. GO Pass admission is equivalent to a Trustees Family Membership admission price at Trustees properties that charge an admission fee.

GO Passes are valid for admission only; not valid for discounts at parking kiosks, stores, cafes, Inns, Campgrounds, at special events or programs, on equipment rentals, or in place of any permits or passes.
To use GO Passes with a Trustees site that requires timed entry, you will need to enter the promo code listed on the physical pass. Passes are available at www.thetrustees.org/passes

passes.title: Trustees Of The Reservations
passes.benefit_text: Pass holders will receive free admission to the USS Constitution museum. One pass allows free admission for up to 5 people per day. One pass per party, please.
source_phrases: Pass holders will receive free admission to the USS Constitution museum. One pass allows free admission for up to 5 people per day. One pass per party, please.

passes.title: The Uss Constitution Museum
passes.benefit_text:
Admits 6 people at $9.00 per Adult and $6.00 per Child.
Under age 2 is free.
Valid for general daytime admission to Franklin Park Zoo or Stone Zoo only. Not valid for Boston Lights or ZooLights .
No reservation required.
